title: Vadapalani Andavar Temple
tagline: Vadapalani Andavar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vadapalani Andavar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Muruga.
overview.description: Vadapalani Andavar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Muruga. It is located in Vadapalani, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It was renovated in the 1920s and a Rajagopuram was built during that time. The temple has grown in popularity, which is believed to be in part due to the patronage of cinema stars.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vadapalani metro station
topPlaces.description: Vadapalani is an elevated metro station on the South-East Corridor of the Green Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station serves the neighbourhoods of Vadapalani and Kodambakkam and is one of the major stations on the Koyambedu-Alandur stretch and became operational by early 2015.

topPlaces.name: Vadapalani
topPlaces.description: Vadapalani is a neighbourhood in the city of Chennai in Tamil Nadu, India. It is known for its film studios, the Vadapalani Andavar Temple, and Vengeeswarar Temples which are important pilgrimage centres for Hindus.

topPlaces.name: KM Music Conservatory
topPlaces.description: KM Music Conservatory (KMMC) is a conservatoire college founded A. R. Rahman, located in Arumbakkam, Chennai, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, the conservatory offers a range of part-time and full-time courses in Hindustani and Western classical music and music technology. Fathima Rafiq is the principal.

topPlaces.name: Trustpuram
topPlaces.description: Trustpuram is a residential area in Kodambakkam, in the city of Chennai, India.

topPlaces.name: Arumbakkam metro station
topPlaces.description: Arumbakkam is an elevated metro station on the South-East Corridor of the Green Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station will serve the neighbourhoods of Vinayagapuram, Choolaimedu and MMDA Colony.

topPlaces.name: Sridevi Nrithyalaya
topPlaces.description: Sridevi Nrithyalaya is a dance school based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The school was founded in 1987 and operates as a trust.

topPlaces.name: Kodambakkam
topPlaces.description: Kodambakkam (also known as K-Town or Kollywood) is a business and residential neighbourhood in Central Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The neighbourhood is served by Kodambakkam railway station of the Chennai Suburban Railway Network.

topPlaces.name: Radha Regent Hotel, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Radha Regent Chennai, earlier called as Radha Park Inn, is a four-star hotel located at Arumbakkam in Chennai, India. The hotel is the second hotel of the Sarovar Hotels & Resorts in India and the first of star hotels to open on Inner Ring Road, Chennai.

This station serves the neighbourhoods of Vadapalani and Kodambakkam and is one of the major stations on the Koyambedu-Alandur stretch and became operational by early 2015.

Arumbakkam is an elevated metro station on the South-East Corridor of the Green Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station will serve the neighbourhoods of Vinayagapuram, Choolaimedu and MMDA Colony.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vadapalani Andavar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vadapalani Andavar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vadapalani Andavar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (8 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vadapalani Andavar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vadapalani Andavar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vadapalani Andavar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vadapalani Andavar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vadapalani Andavar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vadapalani metro station, Vadapalani, KM Music Conservatory, Trustpuram, Arumbakkam metro station.
